title: Lamb and Cottage Pie
description: A twist on the classic British dish, using gluten-free ingredients and featuring tender lamb and creamy cottage cheese.
instructions: Season the lamb shoulder with salt and black pepper. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Sear the lamb until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the lamb to a plate and set aside. Reduce the heat to medium and add the butter to the skillet. Once melted, add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the gluten-free flour to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Slowly add 1 cup of beef broth to the skillet, whisking continuously. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until thickened, about 2-3 minutes.
Return the lamb to the skillet and stir to coat with the gravy. Transfer the lamb to a baking dish and top with the cottage cheese.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes. Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
